stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 6, a Take-off Alternate is an alternate aerodrome at which an aircraft would be able to...

options.a: take-off, if it is not possible to use the aerodrome of departure.
options.b: land, in the event that a diversion becomes necessary while en route, and where a subsequent take-off shall meet all performance requirements.
options.c: land, if a subsequent take-off from the destination aerodrome may become impossible or inadvisable.
options.d: land, should this become necessary shortly after take-off and it is not possible to use the aerodrome of departure.
